\begin{frontmatter}
\title{Anomalous Transport in a Two-Dimensional Electron Gas}
\author[0,1]{Alice Anderson\corref{cor1}}
\ead{alice.anderson@university-a.edu}
\author[1]{Bob Baker}
\affiliation[0]{organization={Department of Physics, University A, City A, Country A}}
\affiliation[1]{organization={National High Field Laboratory, City B, Country B}}
\cortext[cor1]{Corresponding author}
\begin{abstract}
We report anomalous transport signatures in a two-dimensional electron gas and analyze their temperature dependence.
\end{abstract}
\begin{keyword}
transport \sep two-dimensional electron gas
